strings.search.label: Search rules
strings.sections.favorites.title: Favorites
strings.sections.favorites.subtitle: Your quick access rules (Drag or Shift+Arrow to reorder)
strings.sections.favorites.empty: Click the star icon on any rule to add it to your favorites.
strings.sections.movement.title: Movement
strings.sections.movement.subtitle: limited by movement speed
strings.sections.movement.description: You can move at any time during your turn (before, after, or during actions).
strings.sections.action.title: Action
strings.sections.action.subtitle: 1/turn
strings.sections.action.description: You can also interact with one object or feature of the environment for free.
strings.sections.bonusAction.title: Bonus action
strings.sections.bonusAction.subtitle: max. 1/turn
strings.sections.bonusAction.description: You can take a bonus action only when a special ability, spell, or feature states that you can do something as a bonus action.
strings.sections.reaction.title: Reaction
strings.sections.reaction.subtitle: max. 1/round
strings.sections.reaction.description: A reaction is an instant response to a trigger of some kind, which can occur on your turn or on someone else's.
strings.sections.condition.title: Condition
strings.sections.condition.description: Conditions alter your capabilities in a variety of ways, and can arise as a result of a spell, a class feature, a monster's attack, or other effect.
strings.sections.environment.title: Environmental Effects
strings.sections.environment.obscurance: Effects that obscure vision can prove a significant hindrance to most adventuring tasks.
strings.sections.environment.light: The presence or absence of light in an environment creates three categories of illumination.
strings.sections.environment.vision: Some creatures have extraordinary senses that allow them to perceive their environment.
strings.sections.environment.cover: Obstacles can provide cover during combat, making a target more difficult to harm.
strings.sections.environment.other: Adventurers may also face a variety of environmental hazards and hidden dangers.
strings.settings.title: Settings & Accessibility
strings.settings.content.title: Content Rulesets
strings.settings.content.description: Control which rule sets are displayed throughout the application.
strings.settings.optional.title: Include Optional Rules (*)
strings.settings.homebrew.title: Include Homebrew Rules (**)
strings.settings.rules2024.title: Use 2024 Rules
strings.settings.appearance.title: Appearance & Accessibility
strings.settings.appearance.description: Customize the application's look, feel, and behavior.
strings.settings.language.title: Language
strings.settings.language.description: Choose menu and rule data language.
strings.settings.theme.title: Color Theme
strings.settings.darkMode.title: Dark Mode
strings.settings.darkMode.description: Switch between light and dark modes.
strings.settings.reduceMotion.title: Reduce Motion
strings.settings.wakeLock.title: Keep Screen On
strings.settings.wakeLock.description: Prevent screen from sleeping while active.
strings.settings.density.title: Display Density
strings.settings.density.description: Adjust spacing and sizing of items.
strings.settings.data.title: Data Management
strings.settings.exportNotes.title: Export Notes
strings.settings.importNotes.title: Import Notes
strings.settings.importNotes.description: Restore notes from a previous export file.
strings.settings.exportFavorites.title: Export Favorites
strings.footer.message: A quick reference tool for Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition players and Dungeon Masters.
strings.cookie.title: Your Privacy
strings.cookie.text: This website uses local storage to save your preferences and settings. By clicking "Accept", you agree to this practice.
